policy_description: Decrease agricultural exports relative to baseline levels by the final time period.
Expand conservation agriculture practices — minimum tillage, permanent soil cover, and species diversification — increasing crop residues retained on the field.
Apply a fractional increase to crop yield factors per hectare to improve land productivity.
Reduce methane emissions from rice cultivation through improved water management, fertilization, tillage, and residue management practices.
Reduce pre-consumer food waste along the agricultural supply chain, lowering production demand for crops.
Decrease total nitrogen applied through precision fertilizer use without reducing crop yields.
Decrease lime applied to agricultural soils through improved soil management and pH monitoring practices.
Convert a share of pasture to silvopasture (integrated tree–livestock systems), with livestock carrying capacity adjusted to compensate.
Decrease soil organic carbon loss in grasslands by expanding sustainable grazing practices across a defined share of pasture area.
Increase probability of land being converted to secondary forest, raising secondary forest area above baseline by the final time period.
Halt deforestation by setting the primary forest self-transition probability to near one — primary forest is kept as primary forest rather than being converted to other land uses.
Decrease exports of livestock and livestock products relative to baseline levels by the final time period.
Increase livestock carrying capacity (average land productivity) above baseline levels by the final time period.

Reduce methane emissions from enteric fermentation in ruminant livestock through feed management and/or methagenic vaccines. Default reductions per species: 40% for buffalo, dairy cattle, and non-dairy cattle; 56% for goats and sheep.
bau: Default rates: 40% reduction (buffalo, cattle), 56% reduction (goats, sheep)
unconditional: Default rates: 40% reduction (buffalo, cattle), 56% reduction (goats, sheep)
conditional: Default rates: 40% reduction (buffalo, cattle), 56% reduction (goats, sheep)

transformation_name: Improve manure management for cattle and pigs
policy_description: Improve manure management for cattle (dairy and non-dairy) and pigs, directing treated manure to: ~59% anaerobic digestion, ~24% daily spreading, and ~12% composting by the final time period.
bau: Manure treated (cattle, pigs): ~59% anaerobic digestion, ~24% daily spread, ~12% composting
unconditional: Manure treated (cattle, pigs): ~59% anaerobic digestion, ~24% daily spread, ~12% composting
conditional: Manure treated (cattle, pigs): ~59% anaerobic digestion, ~24% daily spread, ~12% composting

transformation_name: Improve manure management for other animals
policy_description: Improve manure management for other livestock (buffalo, goats, horses, mules, sheep), directing treated manure to: ~48% anaerobic digestion, ~24% composting, ~12% dry lot, and ~12% daily spreading.
Improve manure management for poultry (chickens), directing treated manure to: ~48% anaerobic digestion and ~48% dedicated poultry manure management pathways.

transformation_name: Increase biogas capture at anaerobic decomposition facilities
policy_description: Increase the fraction of biogas captured at anaerobic livestock manure management facilities.
conditional: 36% of biogas captured at manure facilities

transformation_name: 95% of electricity is generated by renewables in 2050
policy_description: Set a minimum share of electricity generation from renewable sources (geothermal, hydropower, ocean, solar, wind, and tidal) by 2050.
Set a target share of hydrogen production sourced from green hydrogen (electrolysis) by the final time period.

Upgrade electrical transmission infrastructure to reduce grid transmission losses. The magnitude sets a final-period loss ceiling (final_value_ceiling): only regions whose baseline loss exceeds the target are affected; losses already below the ceiling remain unchanged. A minimum feasible loss floor (min_loss) applies regardless of target.
bau: Grid losses capped at 2% — applied only where current losses exceed this level
unconditional: Grid losses capped at 0% — applied only where current losses exceed this level
conditional: Grid losses capped at 9% — applied only where current losses exceed this level

policy_description: Replace methane venting at orphan wells and mining facilities with flaring, converting CH₄ to the less potent CO₂.
bau: 12% of vented methane converted via flaring
unconditional: 4% of vented methane converted via flaring
conditional: 56% of vented methane converted via flaring

policy_description: Reduce fugitive methane emission factors across the production, distribution, and transmission of coal, natural gas, and oil through leak detection and repair (LDAR) programs.
bau: 12% reduction in methane leakage rates (oil, gas, coal sectors)
unconditional: 4% reduction in methane leakage rates (oil, gas, coal sectors)
conditional: 56% reduction in methane leakage rates (oil, gas, coal sectors)

policy_description: Adjust fuel export volumes relative to baseline export levels by the final time period.

transformation_name: Fuel switch high- and low-temp thermal processes.
policy_description: Switch industrial low-temperature heat processes to electricity and high-temperature heat processes to electricity and hydrogen across cement, metals, chemicals, glass, paper, and lime sectors.
bau: 90% of industrial heat processes switched to low-carbon fuels
unconditional: 90% of industrial heat processes switched to low-carbon fuels
conditional: 90% of industrial heat processes switched to low-carbon fuels

policy_description: Increase the average energy efficiency of industrial production processes by fuel type to reduce overall energy demands.
Reduce industrial end-use energy demand through modernization of production processes (kJ per tonne improvement).
bau: 12% reduction in energy needed per unit of industrial output
unconditional: 4% reduction in energy needed per unit of industrial output
conditional: 40% reduction in energy needed per unit of industrial output

policy_description: Reduce overall industrial production demand relative to the baseline by the final time period.
Reduce IPPU emission factors for nitrous oxide (N₂O) generated as a byproduct of industrial processes.
Substitute clinker in cement production with supplementary cementitious materials (SCMs), LC3 cement, or equivalent processes.
bau: Clinker fraction capped at 15% of cement production
unconditional: Clinker fraction capped at 5% of cement production
conditional: Clinker fraction capped at 5% of cement production

policy_description: Reduce emission factors for other fluorinated compounds (SF₆, NF₃, HCFCs) generated as byproducts of industrial processes.
conditional: 5% reduction in SF₆, NF₃, and other fluorinated compound emissions

policy_description: Reduce IPPU emission factors for hydrofluorocarbons (HFCs) through improved refrigerant management, recovery, and phase-down.
bau: 3% reduction in HFC emissions from industrial processes
unconditional: 1% reduction in HFC emissions from industrial processes
conditional: 10% reduction in HFC emissions from industrial processes

policy_description: Reduce IPPU emission factors for perfluorinated carbons (PFCs) generated as byproducts of industrial processes.
conditional: 5% reduction in PFC emissions from industrial processes

policy_description: Reduce average per-capita demand for cattle products through dietary shifts toward healthier, lower-emissions diets.
Deploy carbon capture and sequestration (CCS) across applicable industrial facilities excluding energy generation, with a default capture efficacy of 90%.
Reduce electricity demand in buildings by increasing the efficiency of electrified appliances and building energy systems.

transformation_name: Reduce end-use demand for heat energy by improving building shell
policy_description: Reduce end-use heat energy demand in buildings through retrofitting, insulation improvements, and smart thermostats.
bau: 10% reduction in building heat energy demand
unconditional: 5% reduction in building heat energy demand
conditional: 60% reduction in building heat energy demand

transformation_name: Switch to electricity for heat using heat pumps, electric stoves, etc.
policy_description: Electrify building heat demand (space heating, water heating, and cooking) using heat pumps, electric stoves, and equivalent equipment.
Reduce aggregate public and private transportation demand through urban planning, congestion pricing, and demand management policies.
Set a minimum share of the light-duty vehicle fleet (private cars and light trucks) fueled by electricity
Electrify rail transportation (freight and passenger) by setting a target share of rail demand fueled by electricity.
Shift maritime transportation demand away from fossil fuels toward hydrogen and electricity.

transformation_name: Fuel switch medium duty road transport
policy_description: Shift medium-duty vehicles (heavy freight, regional, and public transport) from fossil fuels to electricity and hydrogen.
bau: 14% of medium-duty fleet shifted to electricity or hydrogen
unconditional: 7% of medium-duty fleet shifted to electricity or hydrogen
conditional: 21% of medium-duty fleet shifted to electricity or hydrogen

policy_description: Improve the on-road efficiency of electric vehicles through regulation and technology standards.
bau: 8% improvement in electric vehicle fuel efficiency
unconditional: 2% improvement in electric vehicle fuel efficiency
conditional: 38% improvement in electric vehicle fuel efficiency

policy_description: Improve the on-road efficiency of non-electric vehicles (fossil-fuel ICEs and other fuel types) through fuel standards and regulation.
unconditional: 1% improvement in non-electric vehicle fuel efficiency
conditional: 38% improvement in non-electric vehicle fuel efficiency

policy_description: Increase the average occupancy rate of private light-duty vehicles through carpool lanes and incentive programs.
Shift a share of aviation and road freight demand to freight rail by the final time period.

transformation_name: Mode shift passenger vehicles to others
policy_description: Shift a share of passenger road demand to human-powered transport, powered bikes, and public transit.
bau: 9% of private road trips shifted to public or active transport
unconditional: 3% of private road trips shifted to public or active transport
conditional: 30% of private road trips shifted to public or active transport

policy_description: Shift shares of regional aviation and light-duty road demand to heavy-duty road transport.
Increase the fraction of biogas captured at anaerobic wastewater treatment facilities (advanced and secondary anaerobic).
bau: 17% of biogas captured at wastewater treatment facilities
unconditional: 8% of biogas captured at wastewater treatment facilities
conditional: 42% of biogas captured at wastewater treatment facilities

policy_description: Increase compliance with pumping schedule and maintenance requirements for rural septic tanks to preserve full emissions and health benefits.
conditional: 18% of septic tanks meeting maintenance compliance standards

policy_description: Restructure industrial wastewater treatment to default targets: 80% in advanced anaerobic facilities, 10% secondary aerobic, and 10% secondary anaerobic. Targets may be overridden via dict_magnitude.
bau: Target mix: 80% advanced anaerobic, 10% secondary aerobic, 10% secondary anaerobic
unconditional: Target mix: 80% advanced anaerobic, 10% secondary aerobic, 10% secondary anaerobic
conditional: Target mix: 80% advanced anaerobic, 10% secondary aerobic, 10% secondary anaerobic

policy_description: Restructure rural wastewater treatment so that 100% is treated in septic tanks (default target). Target may be overridden via dict_magnitude.
bau: Target mix: 100% treated in septic tanks
unconditional: Target mix: 100% treated in septic tanks
conditional: Target mix: 100% treated in septic tanks

policy_description: Restructure urban wastewater treatment to default targets: 30% advanced anaerobic, 30% advanced aerobic, 20% secondary anaerobic, and 20% secondary aerobic. Targets may be overridden via dict_magnitude.
bau: Target mix: 30% advanced anaerobic, 30% advanced aerobic, 20% secondary anaerobic, 20% secondary aerobic
unconditional: Target mix: 30% advanced anaerobic, 30% advanced aerobic, 20% secondary anaerobic, 20% secondary aerobic
conditional: Target mix: 30% advanced anaerobic, 30% advanced aerobic, 20% secondary anaerobic, 20% secondary aerobic

policy_description: Increase the fraction of captured biogas converted to energy use.
bau: 17% of captured biogas converted to energy
unconditional: 8% of captured biogas converted to energy
conditional: 17% of captured biogas converted to energy

policy_description: Reduce per-capita food waste generation at the consumer level.
bau: 9% reduction in per-capita consumer food waste
unconditional: 3% reduction in per-capita consumer food waste
conditional: 9% reduction in per-capita consumer food waste

policy_description: Increase the fraction of incinerated solid waste used for energy recovery (waste-to-energy).
bau: 17% of incinerated waste used for energy recovery
unconditional: 8% of incinerated waste used for energy recovery
conditional: 17% of incinerated waste used for energy recovery

policy_description: Increase the fraction of biogas captured from landfills and anaerobic digesters.
bau: 17% of biogas captured from landfills and digesters
unconditional: 8% of biogas captured from landfills and digesters
conditional: 17% of biogas captured from landfills and digesters

policy_description: Increase the fraction of organic waste (yard waste, food waste, and sludge) treated in anaerobic digesters and compost facilities.
bau: 48% of organic waste to anaerobic digestion, 48% to composting
unconditional: 48% of organic waste to anaerobic digestion, 48% to composting
conditional: 48% of organic waste to anaerobic digestion, 48% to composting

policy_description: Increase the fraction of solid waste — not recycled, composted, or digested — directed to managed sanitary landfills (away from open dumping).
Increase the fraction of recyclable solid waste that is recycled, reducing landfill decomposition and virgin material production.
Deploy Direct Air Capture (DAC) technology to remove CO₂e directly from the atmosphere by 2050.
